Texts.Pipelines:ApiTokens:
🔐 *API Tokens*

API tokens allow external services and tools to interact with Eclipse _on your behalf_ — without exposing your account credentials.

⚠️ *Treat tokens like passwords:*
• Never share them publicly
• Revoke any token you no longer use
• A leaked token gives _full access_ to your account

*Manage your API tokens responsibly!*
Texts.Pipelines:ApiTokens:List:Empty: You don't have any API tokens yet.
Texts.Pipelines:ApiTokens:Create:EnterName: Enter a name for the new token, or /cancel to return
